frame_analyses.description: Gauze material visible with marked circular pattern, scissors positioned at edge
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good visualization of cutting target, circular pattern clearly marked

frame_analyses.description: Scissors beginning initial entry cut at top of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry point appears close to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing clockwise around circle, approximately 1/4 complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady cutting motion, maintaining proximity to line
Some deviation visible from marked line at lower portion

frame_analyses.description: Cutting near 3/4 completion, some irregular cutting pattern visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut line shows some waviness, particularly in lower quadrants

frame_analyses.description: Nearly complete circle cut, approaching starting point
Circle completely cut out, examining final product
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut circle removed from surrounding gauze material

frame_analyses.description: Final assessment of cut circle quality
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Overall circular shape maintained with some deviation from perfect line

penalties.description: Estimated 3-4mm deviation from marked line in lower left quadrant
Estimated 2-3mm deviation in right side of circle

confidence_rationale: Timer clearly visible throughout showing 109 seconds completion time. Line deviations estimated from available camera angle but exact millimeter measurements difficult to determine precisely. Gauze remained attached and cut was completed successfully.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at each cardinal point due to camera angle and resolution
Precise measurement of deviation at north and south cardinal points
technique_summary: Intermediate level performance with completion time of 109 seconds. Cutting technique was generally steady but showed some deviation from the marked line, particularly in the lower quadrants. Overall task completed successfully with maintained gauze integrity.
strengths: Completed full circle cut without detaching gauze
Reasonable completion time for intermediate level
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining closer adherence to marked line throughout cut
Practice smoother cutting motion to reduce waviness
Improve precision in lower quadrants where most deviation occurred
